ECO-FRIENDLY CORPORATE SUSTAINABILITY STATEMENT

At GreenVision Holdings, we are deeply committed to a sustainable future.
Our company embraces environmentally responsible values and green principles
in everything we do.

We believe in the power of sustainability. Our eco-friendly approach ensures
that every decision we make reflects our commitment to the planet. We are proud
to be a green company that cares about the environment.

Our sustainable vision drives us to think about future generations. We are
dedicated to environmental stewardship and responsible business practices.
Our green values are at the core of our corporate identity.

We support global sustainability goals and align ourselves with the spirit of
environmental responsibility. Our team is passionate about making a difference
for the planet through our sustainable approach to business.

GreenVision Holdings is committed to being a leader in corporate environmental
responsibility. We embrace a greener tomorrow and strive to be an eco-conscious
organization that inspires others to follow our sustainable path.

Together we can build a greener world. Our commitment to sustainability is
unwavering, and we will continue to champion eco-friendly values for years to come.

(No technical data, certifications, measurements, or project-specific environmental
metrics are provided in this document.)
